title: ctenitis minutiloba
intro: Ctenitis minutiloba, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis minutiloba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
